name: pi-icm-hook
description_en: Pi extension wrapping ICM (Infinite Context Memory) as native Pi tools and lifecycle hooks — semantic, cross-session, cross-project recall via the local icm CLI.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，将 ICM (Infinite Context Memory) 包装为原生 Pi 工具和生命周期钩子 — 通过本地 icm CLI 实现语义化、跨会话、跨项目回忆
